'''hachusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:psephomancy|psephomancy]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ch-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:psephomancy|psephomancy]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| hachusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæchisith|hæchisith]] || [[word:hæchisij|hæchisij]] || [[word:hæchisish|hæchisish]] || [[word:hæchisi|hæchisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hachuchusuth|hachuchusuth]] || [[word:hachuchusuj|hachuchusuj]] || [[word:hachuchusush|hachuchusush]] || [[word:hachuchusu|hachuchusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hachusuth|hachusuth]] || [[word:hachusuj|hachusuj]] || [[word:hachusush|hachusush]] || [[word:hachusu|hachusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hachufsuth|hachufsuth]] || [[word:hachufsuj|hachufsuj]] || [[word:hachufsush|hachufsush]] || [[word:hachufsuf|hachufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hachusuthu|hachusuthu]] || [[word:hachusuju|hachusuju]] || [[word:hachusushu|hachusushu]] || [[word:hachusuku|hachusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hachusuth|hachusuth]] || [[word:hachusuj|hachusuj]] || [[word:hachusush|hachusush]] || [[word:hachusu|hachusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hachusuthul|hachusuthul]] || [[word:hachusujul|hachusujul]] || [[word:hachusushul|hachusushul]] || [[word:hachusukul|hachusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hachusuthuthu|hachusuthuthu]] || [[word:hachusujuju|hachusujuju]] || [[word:hachusushushu|hachusushushu]] || [[word:hachusuku|hachusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hachusuthun|hachusuthun]] || [[word:hachusujun|hachusujun]] || [[word:hachusushun|hachusushun]] || [[word:hachusukun|hachusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hachusuthuoro|hachusuthuoro]] || [[word:hachusujuoro|hachusujuoro]] || [[word:hachusushuoro|hachusushuoro]] || [[word:hachusukuoro|hachusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
